name: Trump Media & Technology Group Corp.
business: Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. operates Truth Social, a social media platform, and Truth+, a TV streaming service. It also offers financial technology products through Truth.Fi, including separately managed accounts and exchange-traded funds. Revenue is derived from advertising on Truth Social and subscriptions to Truth+.

exposures.sentence: TMTG thus developed and launched the Truth Social platform, restoring free speech to millions of Americans who had been suffocated by Big Tech.

On April 16, 2024, TMTG announced that, after nine months of testing on its Web and iOS platforms, the Company had completed the research and development phase of a new live TV streaming platform and expects to begin scaling up its own content delivery network (CDN) branded as Truth+.
On January 29, 2025, TMTG announced a financial technology strategy, Truth.Fi.

TMTG has implemented a bitcoin and digital asset treasury strategy to help ensure the Company's financial freedom and protect against discrimination by financial institutions, and may also consider the acquisition of other, similar cryptocurrencies.

On October 28, 2025, we announced TMTG's newest brand, Truth Predict, which aims to make prediction markets available via Truth Social through an exclusive arrangement with Crypto.com Derivatives North America (CDNA), a CFTC-registered exchange and clearinghouse.

catalysts.sentence: On July 7, 2025, TMTG announced the successful launch of global streaming.

catalysts.event: Launch of separately managed accounts (SMAs) under Truth.Fi
catalysts.sentence: On April 15, 2025, TMTG and its partners announced the launch of SMAs.

catalysts.event: Launch of five ETFs on NYSE
catalysts.sentence: On December 30, 2025, TMTG announced the launch of five ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange: Truth Social American Security & Defense ETF (TSSD), Truth Social American Next Frontiers ETF (TSFN), Truth Social American Icons ETF (TSIC), Truth Social American Energy Security ETF (TSES), and the Truth Social American Red State REITs ETF (TSRS).
